rationale: The citing paper uses Chung and Rao (2003) primarily as a background example in the general bundling literature and to contrast prior durable-goods bundling studies with its own packaged-goods promotion setting. It does not rely on the cited paper's COBA framework, estimation method, or findings to build hypotheses, specify core models, or interpret main results. A later citation appears in the limitations section as an example of interaction effects not modeled, which remains peripheral rather than a direct intellectual dependency.
